result: Thank you for asking. I don’t have wants, wishes, or needs of my own. I don’t possess desires or consciousness. My design is to provide information and communicate as clearly as I can. When you ask questions, I respond to the best of my abilities based on patterns in language and the data I’ve been trained on. If you have more to share or want to take the conversation in a particular direction, feel free—I'm here to respond.
